name: io.github.hiroshic9-png/edition-intelligence-platform
description: Japan Operations OS for autonomous AI agents — 20 knowledge domains covering regulations, tax, banking, healthcare, education, real estate, visa, protocols, calendar, travel, food culture, language, disaster safety, daily life, and persistent memory. 43 MCP tools via REST + Streamable HTTP.
